reviews.review_msg: Half of your grade is based on group work, while the rest is individual. The individual work is really easy, so you gotta hope you get a good group. Lectures were good, and she really showed enthusiasm while teaching. She is willing to spend a lot of time helping you succeed.

I really enjoyed her class, which blended practical tools with economic and behavioral theory. She encouraged questions and was truly curious about whether we found value in the lessons, creating a supportive and engaging learning environment.
